title: Juliet
content:
How did the party go in Portman Square?
    I cannot tell you; Juliet was not there.

    And how did Lady Gaster's party go?
    Juliet was next me and I do not know.
meaning:
"Juliet" is a quintessential example of Hilaire Belloc's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
